channel.title: Bare Metal Cloud Status - Incident History

item.title: [GRA1][Dedicated Servers] - Multiple racks maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Aug 11, 07:00 - 10:10 UTC

Jul 3, 07:07 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Bare Metal offer, affecting servers in racks G124B07, G124B14, G124B19, G124B21, G125B02, G125B03, G125B18, G125B21 and G125B22.

Start time : 11/08/2026 07:00 UTC
End time : 11/08/2026 10:10 UTC

List of concerned racks:
- Rack G124B07
- Rack G124B14
- Rack G124B19
- Rack G124B21
- Rack G125B02
- Rack G125B03
- Rack G125B18
- Rack G125B21
- Rack G125B22

Service impact : Public networks will be temporarily unavailable for 30 seconds during the maintenance for servers located in the specified racks.
Service improvement : Following our continuous improvement policy of our network infrastructure, we will be doing a maintenance on a network equipment.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [GRA3][Cooling System] - Rack GRA0326B03C maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 27, 06:00 - 13:00 UTC

Jun 25, 18:15 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, a maintenance is scheduled on our cooling infrastructure.

Start time : 27/07/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 27/07/2026 13:00 UTC
Service impact : During this maintenance, the servers in the affected rack will be gracefully shut down beforehand. Customers hosted on these servers should expect a planned service interruption for the duration of the maintenance window.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [GRA3][Dedicated Servers] - Rack GRA0326B03C maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 23, 06:00 - 14:00 UTC

Jul 9, 19:12 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Bare Metal offer, affecting servers in rack GRA0326B03C.

Start time : 23/07/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 23/07/2026 14:00 UTC
Service impact : During this maintenance, the cooling system's efficiency may be temporarily reduced for some servers, potentially lowering performance. Despite ongoing mitigation efforts, customers could still experience a temporary reboot or shutdown in the worst case. Additionally, public and vRacks networks might be temporarily unavailable for the servers during the maintenance.
Service improvement : Following our continuous improvement policy of our network infrastructure, we will be doing a maintenance on multiple network equipment.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [GRA3][Cooling System] - Rack GRA0326B03C maintenance notification
item.description:

End time : 23/07/2026 14:00 UTC
Service impact : During this maintenance, the cooling system's efficiency may be temporarily reduced for some servers, potentially lowering performance. Despite ongoing mitigation efforts, customers could still experience a temporary reboot or shutdown in the worst case.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [GRA2][Dedicated Servers] - Rack G233B07 Migration Notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 16, 04:00 - 06:00 UTC

Jul 2, 14:27 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a migration from rack G233B07 to G233B08.

Start time : 16/07/2026 04:00 UTC
End time : 16/07/2026 06:00 UTC
Service impact : Servers in rack G233B07 will be unavailable during maintenance for 2 hours.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a migration on our infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [GRA2][Dedicated Servers] - Racks G233A11/G233A10 incident notification
item.description:
Jul 10, 16:27 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering on racks G233A11 and G233A10 has been resolved.

Start time : 09/07/2026 21:38 UTC
End time : 10/07/2026 15:57 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a cooling system issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 9, 23:18 UTC
Update - Ongoing Actions : Our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 9, 21:54 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Dedicated Servers offer in the specific racks.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 09/07/2026 21:38 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some servers in the racks G233A11/G233A10 are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located in the specified racks.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a cooling system issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [GRA1][Dedicated Servers] - Rack G115A11 incident notification
item.description:
Jul 10, 15:05 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering on rack G115A11 has been resolved.

Start time : 10/07/2026 09:11 UTC
End time : 10/07/2026 15:03 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a cooling system issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 10, 11:53 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Dedicated Servers offer on the specific rack G115A11.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 10/07/2026 09:11 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some servers in rack G115A11 are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Some customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located on the specified rack.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a cooling system issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [GLOBAL][Storage and Backups] - NAS HA incident notification
item.description:
Jul 10, 12:35 UTC
Resolved - We had an incident on Storage and Backups offer on NAS HA which has now been resolved.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 09/07/2026 08:00 UTC
End time : 10/07/2026 10:45 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Graphs in the web interface and metrics weren't displayed through the API.
Customers Impact : Some customers may have temporarily seen missing or outdated graphs.
Please note that metrics collection has returned to normal.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a software issue.

We thank you for your understanding and patience throughout this incident.

item.title: [GRA1][Dedicated Servers] - Racks G108A05/G108A06/G108A07 incident notification
item.description:
Jul 10, 02:27 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering has been resolved.

Start time : 09/07/2026 22:47 UTC
End time : 10/07/2026 02:24 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by an electrical equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 9, 23:10 UTC
Update - Please find below an update on the situation :

Update : Some servers in racks G108A05/G108A06/G108A07 are becoming operational again.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 9, 22:54 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Dedicated Servers offer in the specific racks.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 09/07/2026 22:47 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : All servers in the racks G108A05/G108A06/G108A07 are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located in the specified racks.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by an electrical equipment issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [RBX8][Dedicated Servers] - Rack RBX0840E04A incident notification
item.description:
Jul 10, 02:09 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering has been resolved.

Start time : 09/07/2026 23:51 UTC
End time : 10/07/2026 02:08 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a network equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 10, 01:19 UTC
Update - Ongoing Actions : Our teams are currently replacing the faulty network equipment to restore full service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 10, 00:10 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Dedicated Servers offer on the specific rack.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 09/07/2026 23:51 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : vRack network is temporarily unavailable in the specified rack.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access and use their servers through vRack network.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a network equipment issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [GRA1][Dedicated Servers] - Rack G103B02 incident notification
item.description:
Jul 10, 01:44 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering has been resolved.

End time : 10/07/2026 01:38 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by an electrical equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 10, 01:27 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Dedicated Servers offer in the specific rack.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 10/07/2026 01:02 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some servers in the rack G103B02 are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located in the specified rack.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by an electrical equipment issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [GRA3][Dedicated Servers] - Rack GRA0314A06A incident notification
item.description:
Jul 10, 01:16 UTC
Resolved - We would like to inform you that an incident occurred in the rack GRA0314A06A.
This incident has now been resolved.

Please find the details of this incident below :
Start time : 10/07/2026 00:01 UTC
End time : 10/07/2026 01:09 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : IPMI (Intelligent Platform Management Interface) was temporarily unavailable in the specified rack.
Customers Impact : Customers were temporarily unable to access their IPMI network, preventing remote server management such as forced reboots and console access. Please note that the public and private networks remained operational.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a network equipment issue.

We thank you for your understanding and patience throughout this incident.

item.title: [GRA1][Dedicated Servers] - Rack G106A06 incident notification
item.description:
Jul 10, 00:24 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering has been resolved.

Start time : 09/07/2026 22:21 UTC
End time : 10/07/2026 00:23 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by an electrical equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 9, 23:04 UTC

Update : Some servers in rack G106A06 are becoming operational again.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 9, 22:34 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Dedicated Servers offer in the specific rack.

Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [BHS5][Dedicated Servers] - Racks T05G22/T05G23 incident notification
item.description:
Jul 9, 20:06 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering has been resolved.

Start time : 09/07/2026 16:11 UTC
End time : 09/07/2026 20:00 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a cooling system issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 9, 19:24 UTC
Update - We have new information regarding the incident that affected your service(s).

Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : Servers in rack T05G23 are no longer impacted by this incident.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are currently working on the the last impacted servers in rack T05G22.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 9, 17:37 UTC
Update - We have new information regarding the incident that affected your service(s).

Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : Customers are now able to access their servers located in rack T05G22 through vRack network.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are currently working on the impacted servers in racks T05G22 and T05G23.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 9, 17:28 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Dedicated Servers offer on the specific racks T05G22 and T05G23.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 09/07/2026 16:11 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : All servers in rack T05G22 are no longer able to access the vRack network.
Also some servers in racks T05G22 and T05G23 are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers in rack T05G22 via vRack network.
Also some customers are temporarily unable to access and use their servers loacated in racks T05G22 and T05G23.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a cooling system issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [GRA1][Cooling System] - Rack G108B02 maintenance notification
item.description:
Jul 9, 13:26 UTC
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jul 9, 06:02 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jul 7, 12:17 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Start time : 09/07/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 09/07/2026 14:00 UTC
Service impact : During this maintenance, the cooling system's efficiency may be temporarily reduced for some servers, potentially lowering performance. Despite ongoing mitigation efforts, customers could still experience a temporary reboot or shutdown in the worst case.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.
